title: nephrodium filix-mas var. elongatum
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas var. elongatum, also known as the Elongated Male Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Elongated Male Fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the fern is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
